case_title: DEL-CAMP INVESTMENTS, INC vs. CARSWELL, MICHAEL et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEL-CAMP INVESTMENTS, INC AS TO DEFENDANT CARSWELL, MICHAEL DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
